name: Bimbo World: Ass is Power
description:
(Artist is Oroz_Kun)

Bimbo World! A world where the curviest girls are in power! Natural girls have been left behind in favor of big booty bitches with BBL’s, a matching pair of tits, and big fake lips!

Small and petite girls are treated as outcasts, and won’t be accepted until they bimbofy themselves. You enroll in Bad Bitch Academy to study the way of the bimbo, so you can be just as successful as everyone else!

It won’t be easy though, you can’t just get a bolted on pair of tits and become powerful, oh no. You have to work for these boobies.

Compete in Paizuri competitions, enter the twerk off competition, get your lips measured, so many possibilities!
creator: Kingpleb23
